dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world changed drastically a decade ago. A colossal structure, an 'Obelisk,' appeared, connecting dimensions and drawing in those who sought power, wealth, or glory.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: They called it 'The Tower.' My twin brother, Jeong-woo, was one of them. He vanished without a trace, leaving me alone in a world that no longer made sense.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Ten years. Ten years since he disappeared. Ten years since I felt truly alive.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: Another day, another empty sunrise.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A package, long delayed, arrived. Inside, a worn leather journal and an old pocket watch. His watch. My brother's.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) This... this is Jeong-woo's. But how...?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE

dialogue.speaker: Jeong-woo (Diary Entry)
dialogue.line: Day 1 in the Tower. It's exhilarating! The challenges are immense, but the rewards... they're beyond anything I imagined. I can feel myself growing stronger.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLIP

dialogue.speaker: Jeong-woo (Diary Entry)
dialogue.line: We formed a party, 'Arthia.' Ananta, Agares, Triton... they're good people. We're climbing fast. We're going to reach the top, I know it!

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Arthia... I remember him mentioning them in a letter, years ago.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLIP

dialogue.speaker: Jeong-woo (Diary Entry)
dialogue.line: The 20th floor. We found a hidden piece, the 'Philosopher's Stone.' It's incredible power, but... Ananta has been acting strange. And Agares... his eyes hold a darkness I haven't seen before.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Strange? What happened?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FLIP

dialogue.speaker: Jeong-woo (Diary Entry)
dialogue.line: They betrayed me. All of them. They wanted the Stone for themselves. They ambushed me on the 25th floor. I barely escaped, but I'm gravely injured. I'm hiding with the One-horned tribe, but I don't know how much longer I can last.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Betrayed? No... it can't be. He trusted them!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: Jeong-woo (Diary Entry)
dialogue.line: Yeon-woo... if you're reading this, I'm probably gone. They're coming for me. I've left everything I have, all my abilities, my knowledge, my power... in this watch. It's a key. A key to the Tower, and to my revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Jeong-woo (Diary Entry)
dialogue.line: Take it. Take my strength. Climb the Tower. Find out why. And make them pay. For me, Yeon-woo. For us.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRUMBLE

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) Jeong-woo... my brother... he was murdered. Betrayed by those he called friends.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: Ananta. Agares. Triton. Arthia.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: (Thought) My brother's last wish... his dying plea. I will grant it.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: The Tower. So that's where you are, Jeong-woo. And that's where I'm going.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: I will climb. I will become strong. Strong enough to tear down everything they built. Strong enough to make them regret the day they ever touched you.

dialogue.speaker: Yeon-woo
dialogue.line: My name is Cha Yeon-woo. And I will avenge my brother.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH

summary: Yeon-woo, living a solitary life after his twin brother Jeong-woo's disappearance, receives a mysterious package containing his brother's diary. Reading through the entries, Yeon-woo uncovers the shocking truth of his brother's betrayal and murder within the treacherous Obelisk, 'The Tower,' igniting a fierce desire for vengeance.
